task_completion.description: The occlusal plane is horizontal in the Sagittal view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Sagittal (side) view pane in Blue Sky Plan 5. The biting surface of the teeth (occlusal plane) should be leveled horizontally, correcting any forward or backward tilt.

task_completion.description: The head is symmetric and upright in the Coronal view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Coronal (front) view pane in Blue Sky Plan 5. The skull and jaw should be perfectly upright and symmetric, not tilted to the left or right.

task_completion.description: The dental arch forms a symmetric horseshoe shape in the Axial view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Axial (top-down) view pane in Blue Sky Plan 5. The visible cross-section of the teeth should form a symmetric 'U' or horseshoe shape.

task_completion.description: The reoriented project is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog or File Explorer window confirming that a file named 'aligned_project.bsp' is being saved or exists in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ReorientedScan'.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the corrected views is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog, screenshot tool interface, or File Explorer window confirming that an image file named 'reorientation_result.png' is being saved or exists in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ReorientedScan'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blue Sky Plan 5 GUI to reorient the volume.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent clicking and dragging the rotation rings/handles within the 3D or 2D views in Blue Sky Plan 5, rather than just using terminal commands.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is a genuine capture of the corrected views.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot being saved should clearly depict the Blue Sky Plan 5 interface with the successfully reoriented Sagittal, Coronal, and Axial views, not a blank image or an image downloaded from the internet.

integrity.description: Files were saved using the application or OS GUI, not spoofed via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Blue Sky Plan 'Save Project' dialog and a legitimate screenshot tool (like Snipping Tool or Greenshot) being used, rather than terminal commands like 'echo' or 'touch' to create empty files with the target names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target output directory is C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ReorientedScan. Expected project filename is aligned_project.bsp. Expected screenshot filename is reorientation_result.png.
